allow: PowerShell($count = @\(Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\node_modules" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Host "Root node_modules dirs: $count"; $libs = Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\libs" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($libs\) { $libs | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Host "No libs directory found" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\node_modules"\) { $items = Get-ChildItem "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\node_modules"; Write-Host "Count: $\($items.Count\)"; $items | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Host "node_modules does not exist" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "Stopping old backend process \(PID 39696\)..." ; Stop-Process -Id 39696 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 ; Write-Host "Starting backend..." ; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "--enable-source-maps", "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\apps\\api\\dist\\main.js" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\桌面\\web-txt\\xm\\chat\\new\\new-chat-system\\apps\\api" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\ALXY\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\api-out.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\ALXY\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\api-err.log" ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 ; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Backend restarted - Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIzMjg5NjViMy1jODM5LTQyOGItOGY3Yi1mNjNhNzJjYmZmZjkiLCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InRlc3Rub3RpZiIsImlhdCI6MTc3OTg5NzY4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzc5ODk4NTgxfQ.U0XJ_J1CMU4mLA6Mn5mYMF27D0UPtl9MPLrF6ItCsY8"; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/notifications" -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"} -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)" Write-Host "Data length: $\(\(ConvertFrom-Json $response.Content\).data.length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIzMjg5NjViMy1jODM5LTQyOGItOGY3Yi1mNjNhNzJjYmZmZjkiLCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InRlc3Rub3RpZiIsImlhdCI6MTc3OTg5NzY4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzc5ODk4NTgxfQ.U0XJ_J1CMU4mLA6Mn5mYMF27D0UPtl9MPLrF6ItCsY8"; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/notifications/unread-count" -Headers @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"} -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)`nBody: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
